description_long: This lamppost features a tall, slender cylindrical pole with a weathered, greenish patina, suggesting it is made of metal and has been exposed to the elements for some time. The base is slightly thicker and appears robust, likely designed for stability when mounted in the ground. At the top, the lamppost is capped with a classic lantern-style lamp head, which has a four-sided, slightly tapered glass enclosure and a small, pointed finial on the roof. The lamp head is framed with metallic trim, and the glass panels are slightly tinted, giving it an antique or vintage appearance. The overall design is utilitarian with minimal decorative elements, suitable for urban streets, parks, or sidewalks. The lamppost does not feature any signage, banners, or additional attachments.
description: A tall, weathered metal lamppost with a classic lantern-style lamp head and a sturdy cylindrical base, finished in greenish tones with minimal decoration.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full height, cylindrical base, and the lantern-style lamp head with its four-sided glass enclosure.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view, revealing the same features as the front but with subtle shading differences on the pole and lamp head.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, with the lantern head and base visible, but with less detail on the lamp's glass panels.
description_view_3: Side view, showing the slim profile of the pole and the lamp head, emphasizing the verticality and minimal ornamentation.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Classic lantern-style with a four-sided, slightly tapered glass enclosure and a pointed finial on top.
